name: univbench-evaluation
description: Unified benchmark for video foundation models covering understanding, generation, editing, and video reconstruction. 200 high-quality videos; standardized evaluation via UniV-Eval agentic system supporting 6 tasks.
paperTitle: UniVBench: Towards Unified Evaluation for Video Foundation Models
keywords: [video foundation models, benchmark, evaluation, unified assessment]
content:
## UniVBench: Unified Video Foundation Model Evaluation

Fragmented benchmarks make video model comparison difficult. UniVBench provides:
- **6 tasks**: Captioning (V2T), T2V generation, reference video gen, editing, reconstruction
- **200 videos**: High-quality, copyright-free, multi-shot
- **UniV-Eval**: Standardized prompting, parsing, scoring across all tasks

## Task Taxonomy

| Task | Input | Output | Metric |
|------|-------|--------|--------|
| V2T | Video | Caption | BLEU/CIDEr |
| T2V | Text | Video | FVD/Inception |
| R2V | Ref image + text | Video | Consistency |
| TV2V | Video + edit instr | Edited video | Edit fidelity |
| RV2V | Ref image + video + edit | Edited video | Accuracy |
| V2V | Video | Reconstructed video | Pixel/Perceptual |

## Evaluation Framework

```python
class UniVEval:
    """Standardized evaluation for all video tasks"""

    def evaluate(self, model_output, ground_truth, task_type):
        if task_type == "v2t":
            return evaluate_captioning(model_output, ground_truth)
        elif task_type == "t2v":
            return evaluate_generation(model_output, ground_truth)
        # ... other tasks
```
